2606.19946.title: GEMS: Geometric Constraints Enable Multi-Semantic Superposition in LLMs
2606.19946.paper_summary: Activation steering controls model behavior by modifying intermediate hidden states at inference time without retraining. Existing methods handle only single-direction injection; when multiple semantic directions are superposed without constraints, the model collapses. We show that this collapse decomposes into two independently acting sources: distributional deviation, where additive perturbations accumulate in norm across layers and drive activations outside the training distribution, and directional interference, where non-orthogonal semantic vectors mutually dampen when superposed. These two sources define the design constraints that any training-free multi-directional intervention must address. As one instantiation of these principles, we propose GEMS, a training-free method that maps each source to a corresponding geometric constraint: norm-preserving weighted superposition and targeted attention-pathway injection for distributional deviation, and real-time orthogonalization for directional interference. On GSM8K, injecting three concurrent non-mathematical directions preserves accuracy at 98% (baseline 92%), while unconstrained addition collapses to 4%; on Wikitext-2, the same injection incurs only 2.2% PPL increase. Component ablation isolates the causal role of each constraint, and layer-level probes confirm that orthogonalized signals survive the FFN pathway and reach the output distribution with semantic specificity. Qualitative steering effects transfer across architectures from 3B to 31B.
2606.19946.paper_summary_zh: 啟動引導控制通過在推理時修改中間隱藏狀態來模型行為，而無需重新訓練。現有方法僅處理單向注入；當多個語義方向在沒有約束的情況下重疊時，模型會崩潰。我們顯示這種崩潰分解為兩個獨立作用的來源：分佈偏差，其中附加擾動在層之間累積並驅動激活超出訓練分佈，以及方向干擾，其中非正交語義向量在重疊時相互減弱。這兩個來源定義了任何無需訓練的多方向干預必須解決的設計約束。作為這些原則的一種具體實例，我們提出了GEMS，一種將每個來源映射到相應幾何約束的無需訓練的方法：保持範數的加權疊加和針對分佈偏差的目標注意力通道注入，以及實時正交化以應對方向干擾。在GSM8K上，注入三個同時的非數學方向保持了98%的準確率（基線92%），而不受約束的加法崩潰至4%；在Wikitext-2上，相同的注入僅導致2.2%的PPL增長。組件消融隔離了每個約束的因果作用，層級探針確認正交化信號在FFN通道中存活並以語義特異性達到輸出分佈。質性引導效果在從3B到31B的架構之間轉移。
2606.19946.author: Yu Deng et.al.
